title: Into Madness buffs Demon-type creatures

card.rawText: This card only affects Demon-type and Undead-type creatures. Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Hit Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.value: Atk Dice Rolls +1; Hit Dice Rolls +1

plan.title: Into Madness buffs Demon-type creatures
plan.summary: Play Into Madness as field magic and verify a Demon-type creature receives the printed Atk Dice Roll and Hit Dice Roll bonuses.

notes: Use Test Demon Scout because it is Demon-type.

steps: Player 1 plays Into Madness as field magic.
Read the Demon-type creature's effective attack dice.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect the hit roll dice count.

expectedAssertions.label: Demon-type creature attack dice increased by 1
Hit roll used three dice after the +1 Hit Dice Roll bonus
Into Madness remains in magic slot

manualVerification: Confirm non-Demon and non-Undead creatures do not receive this aura.
Confirm Undead-type creatures also receive this aura.
riskNotes: This fixture validates the Demon-type positive case; Undead positive and negative cases are future coverage.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Into Madness field aura for Demon-type creatures.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
